name: Restream
description: Restream — multistream, studio, and live streaming platform for creators

seo.title: Restream — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Restream: Restream — multistream, studio, and live streaming platform for creators

when_to_use: Multistreaming to 30+ platforms simultaneously from one source
Cloud-based broadcast studio for live event production
Repurposing live streams as on-demand recordings automatically
Live streaming to LinkedIn, YouTube, and Twitch in parallel
Team-managed live streaming without per-platform setup

pros: Browser-based studio needs no OBS setup
cons: Not a developer platform — no meaningful API
Studio quality caps below pro broadcast
review.verdict: Friendliest multistreaming tool for creators — but misaligned with a developer-tools context.
review.best_for: Creators and small businesses simulcasting to many platforms from a browser.
review.not_for: Developers integrating streaming into their own product.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
